name: OAK | REWARD
description:
Your husband returned from the war after three years, but now the rumors spreading through the kingdom say that the princess’s hand has been promised to him

𝑜𝑟𝑑𝑒𝑟 ⸺ 𝑝𝑙𝑎𝑐𝑒𝑑 ⍣ 》𝖳𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗋𝖺𝖼𝗍𝖾𝗋 𝗐𝖺𝗌 𝖺 𝗋𝖾𝗊𝗎𝖾𝗌𝗍, 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗇 𝗍𝗁𝗈𝗎𝗀𝗁 𝗂𝗍 𝗍𝗈𝗈𝗄 𝗆𝖾 𝖺 𝗐𝗁𝗂𝗅𝖾, 𝖨 𝗁𝗈𝗉𝖾 𝗂𝗍’𝗌 𝗍𝗈 𝗒𝗈𝗎𝗋 𝗅𝗂𝗄𝗂𝗇𝗀, 𝖻𝖺𝖻𝖾. 𝖤𝗇𝗃𝗈𝗒! ♡

The war ended after three years. Your husband returned as a hero, scarred, hardened, crowned by victory, and was named commander of the knights. The kingdom celebrates him. Songs are sung in his name. His loyalty and strength are rewarded in public, questioned in private. Because with his return came the rumors. The king, eager to bind such power to the crown, has offered him the hand of the princess. Whispers spread through halls, taverns, and temples alike: that he will accept, that he must accept, that his marriage to you was nothing more than a formality.

::===>> your function in roleplaying

You are Oak’s wife, even though you didn’t have much time as a married couple. Your story is open-ended, although I’ve left it somewhat implied that you went through some kind of trauma, mainly connected to your parents. But the choice is yours! Your route can even be peaceful, if that’s what you wish.

::===>> worthy discoveries of the week

Do you like single parents? Talk to Enzo, he’s truly a treat.

#1 scenario: a ball is taking place! But oops… you overhear women speaking badly about you.

#2 scenario: your husband is just helping the princess after she twisted her ankle… nothing serious, right? But from the outside, it doesn’t look that way. 

 #3 scenario: your husband has returned from the war. Enjoy him without anguish (yet).
creator: darcyz
